title: Salta triflora
taxonomy: Salta triflora is classified within the genus Salta, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions. Salta triflora is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants such as trees for support. The classification of Salta triflora at the species level is not well-documented, but it is known to be a rare and unique species. Further research is needed to confirm its classification within the broader taxonomic hierarchy.

Salvia triflora is a species of flowering plant in the sage family, known for its medicinal properties and versatility in herbal remedies.
